title: Sundarbans National Park
tagline: Sundarbans National Park — wildlife reserve of West Bengal

overview.short: Sundarbans National Park is a national park in West Bengal, India, and core part of tiger reserve and biosphere reserve.
overview.description: Sundarbans National Park is a national park in West Bengal, India, and core part of tiger reserve and biosphere reserve. It is part of the Sundarbans on the Ganges Delta and adjacent to the Sundarban Reserve Forest in Bangladesh. It is located to south-west of Bangladesh. The delta is densely covered by mangrove forests, and is one of the largest reserves for the Bengal tiger.

topPlaces.name: Sundarbans
topPlaces.description: Sundarbans is a mangrove forest area in the Ganges Delta formed by the confluence of the Ganges, Brahmaputra and Meghna Rivers in the Bay of Bengal. It spans the area from the Hooghly River in India's state of West Bengal to the Baleswar River in Bangladesh's Khulna Division.

items.note: Sundarbans is a mangrove forest area in the Ganges Delta formed by the confluence of the Ganges, Brahmaputra and Meghna Rivers in the Bay of Bengal. It spans the area from the Hooghly River in India's state of West Bengal to the Baleswar River in Bangladesh's Khulna Division.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sundarbans National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sundarbans National Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sundarbans National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (102 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sundarbans National Park?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sundarbans National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sundarbans National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Sundarbans National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.
